name: Sweet-And-Sour Potatos
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cube the boiled potatoes.
2. Add diced onion, salt, pepper, and sugar to a covered bowl.
3. In a small frypan, cook the bacon until crisp.
4. Add vinegar to the hot bacon and bring to a boil.
5. Pour the boiling mixture over the potato cubes.
6. Mix well. If too tart, add a little more sugar before serving.
7. Adding endive or leaf lettuce is recommended.
